title: mentha royleana
intro: Mentha royleana, also known as Royle's peppermint or Indian penny mint, is a species of mint native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha royleana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mentha royleana can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions or added to food and beverages for their flavor and medicinal properties.
